subcodes.first_line: O morning bird! Verse is more pleasing than prose, and its influence is greater and more abundant. Thus have the mystics [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مرغ سحر کلام منظوم از منثور خوشتر و تاثیرش بهتر و افزونتر است لهذا عارفان
subcodes.subjects: @music and singing, @poems and quotation from poetry, @love of God
